meta.title: Maplify — Animated Map Video Editor
meta.description: Maplify is a visual online editor to create animated map videos. Timeline, live preview, vertical MP4 export (TikTok, Shorts, Reels) and JSON. For creators, journalists, educators.
meta.ogDescription: Build map animation scenarios and export vertical videos in minutes. For content creators, journalists, and educators.

hero.subtitle: Create animated map videos.
hero.description: Maplify is a visual editor to craft map animation scenarios and export vertical videos.

features.label: Features
features.heading: Build animated map scenarios.
features.timelineDesc: Compose a sequence of actions: camera moves, zones, borders, text, images.
features.exportDesc: Generate a video ready for TikTok, Shorts or Reels.
features.aiDesc: An AI chat agent to guide creation and speed up your video production.

preview.label: Preview
preview.heading: Maplify editor in action.
preview.subheading: Prepare your scenes, adjust the camera, place labels and follow the timeline just like a professional editing tool.
preview.caption: Full interface with action panel, timeline and live preview.
preview.aiDesc: An AI chat agent helps you structure a scenario, generate sequence ideas and speed up your video production.
preview.timelineBlockDesc: Each block represents an action on the timeline: camera, zones, routes, labels.

audience.label: Use cases
audience.heading: Who is it for?
audience.teachersDesc: Visual aids to explain territories and geography.
audience.territorialDesc: Showcase a region or local project.

cta.label: Ready to create
cta.heading: Create your first map video.
cta.subheading: Compose a scenario, animate your map and export a vertical video in minutes.

waitlist.title: Your first scenario starts here.
waitlist.subtitle: Maplify is still in development. Join the waitlist to be notified when the editor opens.
waitlist.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again shortly.

faq.a1: Maplify is a visual online editor to create map animation scenarios and export vertical videos (TikTok, Shorts, Reels format). It offers a timeline, live preview, MP4 and JSON export, and an AI agent to help structure scenarios.
faq.a2: Maplify is designed for content creators, journalists, educators, and territorial communication teams who want to create animated map videos for geographic storytelling, news coverage, education, or regional presentations.
faq.a3: A visual timeline to compose scenarios (camera, zones, borders, text, images), live preview during editing, vertical MP4 video export, JSON export to reuse scenarios, and a built-in AI agent to guide creation.
